subject: Error during 2D processing of EER from tilt series
body:
Hello all,

I am trying to align the EER frames to, later on, do a tilt series 
reconstruction.
The processing starts well and work is sent to 4 workers, but they deselect 
the files and I see the following error:






*Received "MovieProcessCTF", with 2 arguments, for GPU #3, 15241 MB 
freeSystem.DivideByZeroException: Attempted to divide by zero.   at 
Warp.GPU.CreateSpectra(IntPtr d_frame, int2 dimsframe, Int32 nframes, 
int3[] h_origins, Int32 norigins, int2 dimsregion, int3 ctfgrid, int2 
dimsregionscaled, IntPtr d_outputall, IntPtr d_outputmean, Int32 planforw, 
Int32 planback)   at Warp.Movie.ProcessCTF(Image originalStack, 
ProcessingOptionsMovieCTF options) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Movie.cs:line 
1377   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 171*

What could cause this error?
Could it be because I didn't provide a gain reference file?
Or are my CTF values incorrect in the CTF section?

[image: screenshot_20220602-085354_gpu11-win.png]
Please see the longer worker output in the attachment.

Thank you so much for your kind help!
JP
